title: Senior Full-stack Engineer, DRISTI 2.0
summary: Own core services of the AI-native rebuild of DRISTI: a court platform light enough to run on a court's own hardware and configurable by its own staff.
body:
## The role

DRISTI 1.0 proved that a redesigned court works: the 24x7 ON Court in Kollam has taken the 600-day cheque dishonour journey down to a median of 164 days. DRISTI 2.0 starts from everything that court taught us, and you will build it.

[draft description, refine before publishing]

## What you'll do

- Design and build core services of DRISTI 2.0: AI-native, standards-compliant, one deployable that runs on-premise
- Turn hard-coded case logic into configuration a court's own staff can manage
- Work in the open: public repos, public docs, a community of contributors around you

## Who this suits

- 5+ years building production systems end to end
- Comfort owning architecture decisions and their consequences
- Care for the person at the end of the system, not just the system

## How it works

Full-time role with a PUCAR collective member organisation. Remote within India, with occasional travel to partner courts.
